summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 民主黨為CLARITY法案增添消費者保護規則，Coinbase高管表示支持。
2. Grayscale計畫將Worldcoin推向華爾街，並已向SEC提交ETF申請。
3. Tether Gold在阿布達比金融中心獲得現貨商品認可，擴大其市場影響力。
4. 韓國銀行擴大CBDC試點計畫，使用者數量已達50萬。
5. 比特幣ETF市場再度回暖，投資者應關注長期潛力。

## 📊 市場概況
今日加密貨幣市場整體表現穩定，比特幣（BTC）價格小幅上漲至$65,164，表現出強勁的抵抗力，無視近期科技股的拋售壓力。以太坊（ETH）亦有1.44%的漲幅，報價$1,896.93。相對而言，BNB和XRP表現平平，BNB小幅下跌0.1%，而XRP則略漲1.07%。整體市場情緒偏向謹慎，恐懼貪婪指數為29，顯示出市場仍然處於恐懼狀態。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
比特幣的相對強弱指數（RSI）為55.14，顯示出市場的上升潛力，並呈現出均線多頭信號，暗示短期內可能持續上漲。以太坊的RSI為60.8，亦顯示出強勁的上升趨勢，並同樣呈現多頭訊號。相對之下，Solana和XRP的RSI低於50，顯示出空頭壓力，需密切關注後續走勢。

## 😱 市場情緒
目前的恐懼貪婪指數為29，顯示市場情緒偏向恐懼，這可能影響投資者的行為，增加市場波動的風險。在這種情況下，投資者可能會更加謹慎，降低交易頻率。社群情緒方面，對於比特幣ETF的回暖消息引發了一定程度的討論熱潮，但整體氛圍仍顯得謹慎。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
隨著市場情緒偏向恐懼，加上近期科技股的波動，市場可能面臨不確定性。特別是SEC對加密挖礦計畫的起訴以及各國對於加密貨幣新規範的推出，可能會對市場造成進一步的壓力，建議投資者保持警覺，避免過度投資。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
關注Grayscale的ETF申請進展，這將對市場情緒和主流幣的價格走勢產生重要影響。此外，留意韓國CBDC試點計畫的進展，這可能引導其他國家對數位貨幣的採納策略。最后，持續追蹤比特幣和以太坊的技術指標變化，以便及時調整投資策略。

news.title: Democrats added certain consumer protection rules to CLARITY: Coinbase exec
news.summary: Coinbase vice chair Ryan VanGrack said that Democratic lawmakers had added provisions on customer protection to a digital asset market structure bill under consideration in the US Senate.
news.title_zh: 民主黨為CLARITY增添某些消費者保護規則：Coinbase高管
news.summary_zh: Coinbase高管表示，民主黨在CLARITY法案中加入了消費者保護規則，以促進加密貨幣市場的透明度。

news.title: Grayscale could take Worldcoin to Wall Street after ETF filing with the SEC
news.summary: The first exchange-traded fund tied to Worldcoin could soon be headed to U.S. markets, as Grayscale files for a Worldcoin ETF.
news.title_zh: Grayscale可能在向SEC提交ETF申請後將Worldcoin推向華爾街
news.summary_zh: Grayscale計劃在提交ETF申請後，將Worldcoin引入華爾街，擴大其市場影響力。

news.title: Tether Gold recognized as Accepted Spot Commodity in Abu Dhabi financial center
news.summary: The recognition allows regulated firms in Abu Dhabi Global Market to offer services involving Tether Gold as tokenized commodities gain broader adoption.
news.title_zh: Tether Gold在阿布達比金融中心被認可為可接受現貨商品
news.summary_zh: Tether Gold獲得阿布達比金融中心的認可，成為合法的現貨商品，進一步提升其市場地位。

news.title: Bitcoin defies recent tech stocks sell-off. Are bulls eyeing a $70K rally?
news.summary: Despite muted derivatives sentiment, Bitcoin’s decoupling and Strategy’s cash raise set the stage for a potential rally to $70,000.
news.title_zh: 比特幣無視近期科技股拋售，牛市是否瞄準7萬美元的反彈？
news.summary_zh: 儘管科技股遭遇拋售，比特幣仍表現強勁，市場分析師預測可能會反彈至7萬美元。

news.title: Kalshi, Polymarket open interest falls 20% as World Cup frenzy winds down
news.summary: Sports accounted for 80% of both Kalshi and Polymarket's total volumes throughout the weekslong World Cup tournament.
news.title_zh: Kalshi、Polymarket的未平倉合約在世界杯熱潮減退中下降20%
news.summary_zh: 隨著世界杯熱潮減退，Kalshi和Polymarket的未平倉合約數量下降了20%。

news.title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
news.summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.
news.title_zh: 韓國銀行擴大CBDC試點計畫，使用者達50萬
news.summary_zh: 韓國銀行的CBDC試點計畫已吸引50萬名使用者，顯示出數位貨幣的潛力。

news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
news.title_zh: 今天加密貨幣市場發生了什麼
news.summary_zh: 今天的加密貨幣市場動態包括價格波動和新政策的影響，值得關注。

news.title: SEC sues Mining Automatic and founder over alleged $22M crypto mining scheme
news.summary: The SEC alleges Mining Automatic and its founder raised $22 million from investors by promising guaranteed crypto mining returns while spending only a fraction of the funds on mining operations.
news.title_zh: SEC起訴Mining Automatic及其創始人，涉及2200萬美元的加密挖礦計畫
news.summary_zh: SEC對Mining Automatic及其創始人提起訴訟，指控其參與一項2200萬美元的詐騙挖礦計畫。

news.title: Trump’s crypto ethics stance leaves Clarity Act negotiations in limbo
news.summary: A meeting last week to discuss an ethics provision to address President Trump's vast crypto wealth has become something of a black box.
news.title_zh: 特朗普的加密倫理立場使Clarity法案談判陷入僵局
news.summary_zh: 特朗普對加密貨幣的倫理立場使得Clarity法案的談判進展緩慢，未能達成共識。

news.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
news.summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.
news.title_zh: 俄羅斯首部全面加密法案距通過僅有兩票之遙
news.summary_zh: 俄羅斯的全面加密法案已接近通過，只需再獲得兩票支持即可實現立法。

news.title: Vietnam sets new crypto trading fines on par with drunk-driving penalties
news.summary: Domestic investors who trade crypto without going through a licensed service provider face fines of roughly $1,140 to $1,900.
news.title_zh: 越南對加密貨幣交易設置新罰款，與酒駕罰款相當
news.summary_zh: 越南政府針對加密貨幣交易制定新的罰款措施，與酒駕罰款相同，以加強市場監管。

news.title: Exodus to cut 25% of staff in company reorganization
news.summary: The wallet company said it expected the layoffs to generate between $10 million and $13 million in savings as part of its strategy to build a full-stack card issuance and payments platform.
news.title_zh: Exodus將裁減25%員工以進行公司重組
news.summary_zh: 數字錢包公司Exodus宣布將裁減四分之一的員工，以應對公司重組的需求。

news.title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
news.summary: For the first time in Cardano's history, no company flipped the switch on a major protocol update.
news.title_zh: Cardano觸發硬分叉，首個社區投票升級
news.summary_zh: Cardano區塊鏈進行硬分叉，這是首次由社區投票決定的升級，旨在提升其功能性。

news.title: AI-assisted hacking is outpacing traditional code reviews, NEAR co-founder says
news.summary: NEAR co-founder Polosukhin called formal verification a necessary shift for securing blockchain code from AI hacking.
news.title_zh: NEAR聯合創始人表示AI輔助黑客攻擊超越傳統代碼審查
news.summary_zh: NEAR的聯合創始人指出，AI技術在黑客攻擊方面的進步已經超過了傳統的代碼審查方式。

news.title: Bitcoin ETFs Are Green Again—Here’s Why Investors Should Zoom Out
news.summary: Two consecutive weeks of inflows ended the worst sustained outflow streak in Bitcoin ETF history. Here's why patience may be required from investors.
news.title_zh: 比特幣ETF再次回暖——投資者應該放眼長遠
news.summary_zh: 比特幣ETF市場回暖，專家建議投資者應該從長遠角度看待投資機會。

news.title: Hut 8, IREN deals lift AI-focused Bitcoin mining stocks
news.summary: Bitcoin miners rallied as investors cheered multi-billion-dollar AI infrastructure contracts, underscoring the sector’s accelerating shift toward data centers and cloud computing.
news.title_zh: Hut 8和IREN交易提升AI專注的比特幣挖礦股票
news.summary_zh: Hut 8和IREN的交易活動推動了以AI為重點的比特幣挖礦股票的增長。

news.title: Former NY Governor Cuomo joins OKX board, touts 24/7 tokenized trading
news.summary: Andrew Cuomo said OKX could help bring round-the-clock trading and more international capital into U.S. markets.
news.title_zh: 前紐約州州長Cuomo加入OKX董事會，推廣24/7代幣化交易
news.summary_zh: 前紐約州州長安德魯·庫莫加入OKX董事會，並推廣全天候的代幣化交易服務。

news.title: Nigerian president signs order on approach to crypto regulation, taxes
news.summary: The West African country’s executive order established a virtual asset council and addressed the fragmentation of crypto regulation for oversight and enforcement.
news.title_zh: 尼日利亞總統簽署法令，規範加密貨幣及稅收
news.summary_zh: 尼日利亞總統簽署新法令，明確加密貨幣的監管和稅收政策，以促進市場發展。

news.title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
news.summary: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.
news.title_zh: Bernstein上調Robinhood目標價，提及代幣化和預測市場
news.summary_zh: 投資公司Bernstein上調了Robinhood的目標價，認為代幣化和預測市場將推動其成長。

news.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
news.summary: "The reduced pace of buys reflects that Bitmine repurchased 5.5 million common shares," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said in a statement.
news.title_zh: Tom Lee的Bitmine減少ETH購買，將8600萬美元轉向股票回購
news.summary_zh: Bitmine決定減少以太坊的購買，並將8600萬美元用於股票回購，以增強財務狀況。

news.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
news.summary: For the second consecutive week, Saylor's company sold MSTR stock instead of BTC to pad its reserves to $3.2 billion.
news.title_zh: 策略透過MSTR出售增加2.25億美元現金儲備，比特幣儲備保持不變
news.summary_zh: 公司透過出售MSTR股票增加現金儲備，但其比特幣儲備未受到影響。

news.title: Bitcoin price hits $65K wall as stocks battle ‘record’ institutional tech sell-off
news.summary: Bitcoin faced troublesome resistance at $65,000 while traders still saw a potential BTC price breakout into a “bullish market structure.”
news.title_zh: 比特幣價格觸及65K美元阻力位，股市面臨‘創紀錄’機構科技拋售
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格在65,000美元遇阻，股市因機構拋售而波動。

news.title: IREN jumps 16% after raising AI cloud revenue target above $4B
news.summary: The Bitcoin miner raised its year-end AI cloud revenue target to more than $4 billion after signing $2.8 billion in new contracts with AI developers.
news.title_zh: IREN股價上漲16%，將AI雲收入目標提高至超過40億美元
news.summary_zh: IREN因提高AI雲服務收入預期，股價大幅上漲。

news.title: Benchmark backs Exodus after 25% workforce cut, says stablecoin pivot is being overlooked
news.summary: Late Friday afternoon, Exodus said it expects the restructuring to generate $10 million to $13 million in annualized cost savings.
news.title_zh: 基準支持Exodus，裁員25%後穩定幣轉型被忽視
news.summary_zh: Exodus在裁員後仍獲得基準支持，但其穩定幣轉型未受到足夠重視。

news.title: Hut 8 fully commercializes 1 GW Texas AI campus with second $9.8B lease as IREN signs $2.8B in contracts; shares climb double digits
news.summary: Hut 8 and IREN shares climb on fresh AI data center deals worth billions as the bitcoin-to-AI pivot continues to accelerate.
news.title_zh: Hut 8全面商業化1GW德州AI校園，IREN簽署28億美元合約，股價雙位數上漲
news.summary_zh: Hut 8和IREN的合作促進了股價上漲，顯示AI市場的潛力。

news.title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
news.title_zh: Exodus將裁減25%全球員工以轉型支付業務
news.summary_zh: Exodus決定裁員以專注於支付業務的轉型。

news.title: AI compute stocks bounce as Hut 8, IREN land billions in new contracts
news.title_zh: AI計算股價回升，Hut 8和IREN獲得數十億新合約
news.summary_zh: AI計算相關股票因新合約而回升，顯示市場信心回暖。

news.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
news.summary: An attacker used a flash loan to distort the bridge's Solana stablecoin pools before moving the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.
news.title_zh: Allbridge在165萬美元閃電貸款攻擊後暫停跨鏈協議
news.summary_zh: Allbridge因安全問題暫停其跨鏈協議，以防止進一步損失。

news.title: Bitmine expands Ethereum treasury to 5.78 million ETH, repurchases 5.5 million shares
news.summary: Bitmine expanded its ether treasury to 5.78 million ETH and repurchased 5.5 million shares under its $4 billion buyback program.
news.title_zh: Bitmine擴大以太坊庫存至578萬ETH，回購550萬股
news.summary_zh: Bitmine增加以太坊持有量並回購股票，顯示其對市場的信心。

news.title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over
news.summary: Renowned trading analyst Peter Brandt says investing in Bitcoin today, will pay off much better in two to three years than buying AI stocks at current prices.
news.title_zh: 彼得·布蘭特預測比特幣熊市結束的確切日期
news.summary_zh: 知名分析師彼得·布蘭特預測比特幣熊市將在特定日期結束，吸引市場關注。

news.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
news.title_zh: 湯姆·李的Bitmine減少以太幣購買，回購8600萬美元股票

news.title: Bernstein lifts Robinhood target to $160, sees prediction markets revenue overtaking crypto
news.summary: Bernstein raised its Robinhood price target to $160, citing prediction markets, Rothera, and Robinhood Chain as key revenue drivers.
news.title_zh: 伯恩斯坦將羅賓漢目標提高至160美元，預測市場收入將超越加密貨幣

news.title: Strategy raises $263.5M through MSTR sales, holds 843,775 Bitcoin
news.summary: Strategy boosted its cash reserve to $3.225 billion after selling MSTR shares, while investors weighed the value of its STRC preferred stock.

news.title_zh: 塞勒的Strategy將現金儲備提高至32億美元，比特幣持有量不變

news.summary: Hyperliquid plans to require developers to stake 500,000 HYPE, worth about $30.4 million, to deploy permissionless prediction markets under HIP-4.

news.summary_zh: Hyperliquid宣布將設置50萬HYPE作為無許可預測市場部署者的抵押要求。

news.title: Strategy sells $263.5 million in MSTR shares, buys no bitcoin as USD reserve tops $3.2 billion
news.summary: Strategy's total holdings account for around 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth roughly $54.7 billion.
news.title_zh: Strategy出售2.635億美元MSTR股票，未購買比特幣，美元儲備超過32億
news.summary_zh: Strategy公司出售大量MSTR股票，並未進一步購買比特幣，美元儲備持平。

news.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
news.summary: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.
news.title_zh: 越南對未經許可的加密交易設置罰款，為監管推出做準備
news.summary_zh: 越南政府針對未經許可的加密貨幣交易設立罰款，為即將到來的監管措施做準備。

news.title: Zilliqa asks exchanges to pause ZIL transfers after suspected cold wallet theft
news.summary: Zilliqa said exchanges paused ZIL deposits and withdrawals after an exchange partner’s cold wallet was compromised, with the amount stolen still undisclosed.
news.title_zh: Zilliqa要求交易所暫停ZIL轉移，因懷疑冷錢包被盜
news.summary_zh: Zilliqa因懷疑冷錢包遭盜，要求各大交易所暫時停止ZIL的轉移。

news.title: Brazil’s securities regulator sets up task force with 60-day deadline for tokenization proposal
news.title_zh: 巴西證券監管機構成立專案小組，60天內提交代幣化提案
news.summary_zh: 巴西證券監管機構成立專案小組，計劃在60天內提出代幣化相關的提案。

news.title: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Opens Prediction Markets to Anyone in HIP-4 Upgrade
news.summary: Plus, a selloff in Oil has markets looking green into the Monday open. And PUMP is leading all alt movers on the week at a surprising time.
news.title_zh: 早安分鐘：Hyperliquid 在 HIP-4 升級中向任何人開放預測市場
news.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 在最新升級中推出預測市場，讓所有用戶都能參與。

news.title: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin ‘vibe-codes’ anonymous billboard demo with onchain moderation on Aztec
news.summary: Vitalik Buterin "vibe-coded" an anonymous billboard demo on Aztec with onchain moderation, a censor role, and a local LLM flagging daemon.
news.title_zh: 以太坊共同創辦人 Vitalik Buterin 在 Aztec 上進行匿名廣告示範，並進行鏈上管理
news.summary_zh: Vitalik Buterin 展示了如何在 Aztec 平台上使用鏈上管理進行匿名廣告。

news.title: A bitcoin 'volmageddon' may be brewing, key indicator suggests
news.title_zh: 比特幣 '波動末日' 可能正在醞釀，關鍵指標顯示
news.summary_zh: 市場分析指出，比特幣可能面臨重大波動，相關指標顯示出不安的跡象。

news.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor Makes 110-Point Case Against Bitcoin's BIP-110
news.summary: The Strategy chairman argued that the soft fork is a 'bad idea,' warning that it would cause more harm than the problem it aims to solve.
news.title_zh: Strategy 的 Michael Saylor 提出 110 點反對比特幣 BIP-110 的理由
news.summary_zh: Michael Saylor 詳細列出反對比特幣 BIP-110 的多項理由，強調其潛在風險。

news.title: Bank of Korea prepares for live CBDC transactions with 9 banks in September
news.title_zh: 韓國銀行準備在九月與九家銀行進行 CBDC 實時交易
news.summary_zh: 韓國銀行計劃在九月啟動與多家銀行的 CBDC 實時交易測試。

news.title: Crypto institutions look beyond audits as trust signals falter: Hacken
news.summary: Institutional due diligence is shifting toward continuous monitoring, signer controls and incident readiness after operational failures accounted for most crypto losses.
news.title_zh: 隨著信任信號減弱，加密機構超越審計尋求新方法：Hacken
news.summary_zh: Hacken 報告指出，加密機構在信任問題上尋求新的解決方案，超越傳統審計。

news.title: Capital B approves 10-for-1 reverse stock split to broaden investor base
news.summary: Europe’s second-biggest Bitcoin treasury company said the September reverse stock split should attract more institutional investors to the French company.
news.title_zh: Capital B 批准 10 比 1 的反向股票拆分以擴大投資者基礎
news.summary_zh: Capital B 宣布進行反向股票拆分，旨在吸引更多投資者參與。

news.title: Russia’s parliament to hold final readings on crypto bill Tuesday
news.summary: Russia’s State Duma is set to consider the crypto regulation bill in second and third readings, with rules for investors and cross-border payments included.
news.title_zh: 俄羅斯國會將於週二進行加密法案的最終讀取
news.summary_zh: 俄羅斯國會將對加密法案進行最後的審議，可能影響未來的監管政策。

news.title: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
news.summary: Grayscale plans to establish regular cash distributions from staking rewards generated by its Ether and Solana exchange-traded products.
news.title_zh: Grayscale 計劃定期從 ETH 和 SOL 的質押獎勵中發放現金
news.summary_zh: Grayscale 宣布將定期向投資者發放來自 ETH 和 SOL 質押的現金獎勵。

news.title: Crypto market slips even as equities advance. Pump surges on social-media chatter
news.title_zh: 加密市場下滑，儘管股市上漲。社交媒體熱議推升價格
news.summary_zh: 儘管股市表現良好，加密市場仍然下滑，社交媒體的討論卻推動了部分價格上漲。

news.title: Trader maintains $67K BTC price target: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
news.summary: Bitcoin preserved a key long-term trend line as support for a third week as US-Iran war tensions delivered new five-week highs in oil prices.
news.title_zh: 交易者維持67K美元比特幣價格目標：本週五件事
news.summary_zh: 本週比特幣市場關注交易者對67K美元價格目標的看法及其影響因素。

news.title: Hyperliquid plans to add decentralized prediction markets in upgrade to HIP-4
news.title_zh: Hyperliquid計劃在HIP-4升級中新增去中心化預測市場
news.summary_zh: Hyperliquid即將升級，將引入去中心化預測市場以增強平台功能。

news.title: TD Cowen cuts Smarter Web Company price target 36% on revised bitcoin outlook
news.summary: TD Cowen cut Smarter Web's price target to £0.64 while maintaining a Buy rating, citing revised bitcoin forecasts and treasury assumptions.
news.title_zh: TD Cowen將Smarter Web Company價格目標下調36%，因比特幣展望修正
news.summary_zh: TD Cowen因比特幣市場前景不佳，將Smarter Web Company的價格目標大幅下調。

news.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows extend to second week, but recovery lacks momentum
news.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs extended their inflow streak to two weeks with $75.7 million in net inflows, but analysts said demand remains insufficient to fuel a sustained uptr
news.title_zh: 比特幣ETF資金流入延續至第二週，但復甦缺乏動力
news.summary_zh: 儘管比特幣ETF資金流入持續，但市場復甦的勢頭仍顯得疲弱。

news.title: Cross-chain protocol Allbridge halts after $1.65 million flash loan exploit
news.title_zh: 跨鏈協議Allbridge因165萬美元閃電貸款漏洞暫停運作
news.summary_zh: Allbridge因遭遇閃電貸款攻擊而暫時停止服務，損失高達165萬美元。

news.title: U.S. regulatory developments and earnings, ECB rate decision: Crypto Week Ahead
news.title_zh: 美國監管動態及財報，歐洲央行利率決策：加密貨幣未來一週
news.summary_zh: 本週將關注美國的監管變化及歐洲央行的利率決策對加密市場的影響。

news.title: Amazon Japan supplier AZ-Com Maruwa to adopt yen stablecoin JPYC for payments
news.title_zh: 亞馬遜日本供應商AZ-Com Maruwa將採用日元穩定幣JPYC進行支付
news.summary_zh: AZ-Com Maruwa決定使用JPYC穩定幣進行支付，顯示對數字貨幣的接受度提升。

news.title: South Korea eyes September launch for second phase of CBDC pilot: Report
news.summary: The Bank of Korea’s CBDC pilot will add two regional banks, new payment features and tests of government subsidy payments using tokenized bank deposits
news.title_zh: 南韓計劃於九月啟動CBDC試點第二階段：報導
news.summary_zh: 南韓將於九月啟動中央銀行數字貨幣的第二階段試點，進一步探索數字貨幣的應用。

news.title: Live updates: Bitcoin rises to one-month high of $65,700 before pulling back with stocks
news.title_zh: 即時更新：比特幣漲至65,700美元的一個月高點，隨後隨股市回落
news.summary_zh: 比特幣一度達到65,700美元的高點，但隨著股市回落而出現調整。

news.title: Moonshot AI IPO push follows Kimi, Alibaba AI releases that shook bitcoin
news.title_zh: Moonshot AI IPO推進跟隨Kimi和阿里巴巴AI發布，震撼比特幣
news.summary_zh: Moonshot AI的首次公開募股計劃受到Kimi和阿里巴巴AI發布的影響，對比特幣市場造成波動。

news.title: Bitcoin ETFs see new money again, but inflows remain ‘peanuts’ relative to the recent exodus
news.title_zh: 比特幣ETF再次吸引新資金，但流入量相對於近期撤資仍然微不足道
news.summary_zh: 儘管比特幣ETF獲得新資金，但與最近的資金外流相比，流入量仍然很小。

news.title: Hyperliquid’s HIP-4 to support permissionless deployment for outcome markets
news.summary: HIP-4 deployers must stake 500,000 HYPE tokens and can take up to 50% fees on their validator-aligned markets.
news.title_zh: Hyperliquid的HIP-4將支持無需許可的結果市場部署
news.summary_zh: Hyperliquid推出HIP-4，允許無需許可的市場結果部署，促進更靈活的交易環境。

news.title: Bitcoin flat near $64,000 as oil hits a one-month high and Kimi AI selloff lingers
news.title_zh: 比特幣在64,000美元附近持平，油價創一個月新高，Kimi AI拋售持續
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格穩定在64,000美元附近，油價上漲，而Kimi AI的拋售情況仍在持續。

news.title: Cardano activates van Rossem hard fork
news.summary: The upgrade reduces smart contract execution costs while laying the groundwork for Ouroboros Leios, a major scalability upgrade expected later this year.
news.title_zh: Cardano啟動van Rossem硬分叉
news.summary_zh: Cardano成功啟動van Rossem硬分叉，旨在提升其區塊鏈的功能和性能。

news.title: Japanese logistics firm turns to JPYC stablecoin to fight labor shortages: report
news.summary: By offering contractors faster payments with stablecoins, the firm seeks to attract more business partners, according to Nikkei.
news.title_zh: 日本物流公司轉向JPYC穩定幣以應對勞動力短缺：報導
news.summary_zh: 為了應對勞動力短缺，日本一家物流公司開始使用JPYC穩定幣進行支付。

news.title: Allbridge Core pauses protocol after $1.65 million flash loan exploit: onchain analysts
news.summary: Security firms PeckShield and CertiK flagged that the attacker has bridged the stolen funds from Solana to Ethereum.
news.title_zh: Allbridge Core在165萬美元閃電貸款漏洞後暫停協議：鏈上分析師
news.summary_zh: 因遭遇165萬美元的閃電貸款攻擊，Allbridge Core決定暫時停止其協議運作。

news.title: Stablecoins vs Traditional Banking
news.summary: A stablecoin is a cryptocurrency pegged to a reference asset, such as the U.S. dollar or Euro. Like a bank, stablecoin issuers hold onto vast amounts of deposits, as they take cash in return for issuing their coin onchain. This makes them similar in some ways to a traditional bank, but the two differ in […]
news.title_zh: 穩定幣與傳統銀行業的比較
news.summary_zh: 穩定幣與傳統銀行業的比較，探討兩者在金融體系中的角色和優缺點。

news.title: Allbridge pauses cross-chain bridge after $1.65M exploit
news.summary: The attacker allegedly used a flash loan and rapid swaps to manipulate the bridge’s stablecoin exchange rate.
news.title_zh: Allbridge在165萬美元漏洞後暫停跨鏈橋
news.summary_zh: Allbridge因為遭受165萬美元的安全漏洞，暫停了其跨鏈橋的運作。

news.title: Japanese logistics company eyes JPYC stablecoin to pay drivers
news.summary: The planned rollout would let thousands of transportation contractors receive digital yen payments more frequently and quickly.
news.title_zh: 日本物流公司考慮使用JPYC穩定幣支付司機
news.summary_zh: 一家日本物流公司計劃使用JPYC穩定幣來支付其司機，以解決支付問題。

news.title: South Korea probed 40 cases of crypto manipulation over 2 years
news.summary: Financial Services Commission Chair Lee Eog-won posted the figures on the second anniversary of the enactment of the Virtual Asset User Protection Act.
news.title_zh: 南韓調查兩年內40起加密貨幣操縱案件
news.summary_zh: 南韓當局在過去兩年內對40起加密貨幣操縱案件展開調查，旨在維護市場公平。

news.title: Will the US get CLARITY this week? Bitcoin’s new $80K target: Hodler’s Digest, July 19
news.summary: The fate of the CLARITY Act hinges on Trump’s ethics, so the odds aren’t looking great. Prediction market volumes hit new highs, and more news.
news.title_zh: 美國本週會獲得清晰度嗎？比特幣新目標為8萬美元：持幣者摘要，7月19日
news.summary_zh: 本週美國可能會釐清比特幣市場的走向，分析師預測比特幣將達到8萬美元的新目標。
